profiles.title: Work Profiles
profiles.name: Name
profiles.noProfiles: No profiles yet. Add the first team member.
profiles.dreyfusText: 1-Novice: follows rules, needs supervision. 2-Advanced Beginner: uses guidelines, limited context. 3-Competent: plans ahead, can prioritize. 4-Proficient: sees the big picture, adapts. 5-Expert: intuitive, transcends rules.

matrix.title: Skill Matrix
matrix.noData: Add profiles with skills to see the matrix.

credits.title: Project Credits
credits.explainer: Project Credits track contributions to projects beyond day-to-day work. They recognize extra effort, cross-team collaboration, and innovation. Keep points simple (1-5) and avoid gaming incentives by tying them to recognition, not salary.
